affects: Although Lineage A is evolutionarily older, Lineage B started spreading in human
rationale: Carries 25% of the evidential support for conclusion C088 (deterministic graph concentration; ~8.11 effective independent claims back that conclusion in total).
model_rationale: C090 (Lineage B started spreading 3-4 days earlier than Lineage A) is the direct support for C088 (Lineage B spread first) via C089→C090→C088. C088 depends_on(strong) C090 and C090 depends_on(strong) C082. C090 also supports C100 directly and underlies the double-spillover narrative. If C090 flips (i.e., Lineage B's greater prevalence is explained by super-spreader events rather than earlier start), C116 becomes the dominant explanation, C088 collapses, C100 loses its primary explanandum, and the wet-market double-spillover story fails. C116 explicitly contradicts C090 and C100. Because C088 depends_on(strong) C090, and C100 depends_on(strong) C088, a flip of C090 propagates through both strong-dependency edges to undermine both conclusions.
